summary: A silly tiger misunderstands a dried persimmon, bows to the “mighty persimmon,” and accidentally becomes the funniest creature in the village.
sensitivityNotes: The tiger is silly and harmless.

text.enLittle: At the edge of a sleepy village, a tiger practiced his scariest face in a puddle.
text.enStandard: At the edge of a sleepy village, a tiger practiced his scariest face in a puddle. The puddle was not impressed.
text.koLittle: 졸린 마을 끝에서 호랑이가 물웅덩이에 대고 무서운 얼굴을 연습했어요.
text.koStandard: 졸린 마을 끝에서 호랑이가 물웅덩이에 대고 무서운 얼굴을 연습했어요. 물웅덩이는 조금도 놀라지 않았지요.

pages.koreanText: 졸린 마을 끝에서 호랑이가 물웅덩이에 대고 무서운 얼굴을 연습했어요. 물웅덩이는 조금도 놀라지 않았지요.
pages.englishText: At the edge of a sleepy village, a tiger practiced his scariest face in a puddle. The puddle was not impressed.
pages.narrationScript: 졸린 마을 끝에서 호랑이가 물웅덩이에 대고 무서운 얼굴을 연습했어요. 물웅덩이는 조금도 놀라지 않았지요.

text.enLittle: “Tonight,” said the tiger, “someone will tremble at my roar.
text.enStandard: “Tonight,” said the tiger, “someone will tremble at my roar.” He roared. A cricket answered, chirp.
text.koLittle: “오늘 밤엔 누군가 내 울음소리에 벌벌 떨겠지.” 호랑이가 말했어요.
text.koStandard: “오늘 밤엔 누군가 내 울음소리에 벌벌 떨겠지.” 호랑이가 말했어요. 그가 으르렁대자 귀뚜라미가 찍, 대답했지요.

pages.koreanText: “오늘 밤엔 누군가 내 울음소리에 벌벌 떨겠지.” 호랑이가 말했어요. 그가 으르렁대자 귀뚜라미가 찍, 대답했지요.

text.enLittle: From a cottage came a baby’s wail.
text.enStandard: From a cottage came a baby’s wail. “Aha!” said the tiger. “At last, someone knows I am near.”

text.enLittle: Mother rocked the baby.

text.enLittle: Then Mother smiled.

pages.audioPrompt: English-first warm professional picture-book narration with sleepy comic relief; Korean optional narration should sound natural, musical, and culturally grounded. Read-aloud cue: drowsy smile

layers.name: particle_glow
layers.motion: opacity pulse or slow particle drift
